text: Sam - $4M at 20 pre, confirmed. One board seat for you, plus one independent we name together. Docs this week, close end of month. Anything you want to push on before I send?
before standup - auth bug's in the token refresh path, not login. Patch the refresh handler today? lmk
Hi Dana - no rush. When you circle back, slide 4 is the one worth a look; it's the number your team flagged on the call. We re-ran it on your data and it held.
